explanation: Detection could not complete after import
fix: Review the rule named in the message and run dcc_check again

explanation: The source could not be imported under the declared plan
fix: Check the source path format options columns and encoding

explanation: A legacy detector action name maps to more than one rule
fix: Replace it with the exact declared rule id

explanation: A legacy detector action name is still accepted temporarily
fix: Replace it with the declared rule id

explanation: An action points to no declared rule
fix: Use a rule id that exists on the rules sheet

explanation: Record identifiers are duplicated
fix: Make every record id unique in the source data

explanation: One or more record identifiers are blank
fix: Fill every record id before running

explanation: The declared id column is absent
fix: Correct the id role or the columns mapping

explanation: A rule refers to a column absent from imported data
fix: Correct the rule variable or columns mapping

explanation: The required format reader is not installed
fix: Reinstall DCC with all dependencies

explanation: The installed format reader is too old
fix: Update DCC and its dependencies

explanation: The selected format has a documented limitation
fix: Review dcc_capabilities and choose a safer format if needed

explanation: This format is not supported on the current platform
fix: Convert the source to a supported format

explanation: The source does not provide declared column names
fix: Declare fixed width column names in the source sheet

explanation: The text delimiter is missing
fix: Fill the delimiter source setting

explanation: Text encoding was not declared
fix: Fill encoding such as UTF-8 or GB18030

explanation: A low level option would weaken strict raw preservation
fix: Remove the protected option from options_json

explanation: A spreadsheet range is required
fix: Fill an exact range such as A1:Z500

explanation: A spreadsheet sheet was not declared
fix: Fill the exact sheet name or number

explanation: The source file cannot be found
fix: Choose an existing source file

explanation: The format does not accept one of the supplied options
fix: Remove or correct the option named in the diagnostic

explanation: Fixed width column widths are missing
fix: Fill widths as comma separated positive numbers

explanation: Action parameters are not a JSON object
fix: Use {} when no parameters are needed

explanation: An action refers to an unknown rule id
fix: Use an id declared on the rules sheet

explanation: The action name is unsupported
fix: Choose exclude set_na flag or recode

explanation: A source or canonical column name is duplicated
fix: Make every source_name and name unique

explanation: A required column mapping cell is blank
fix: Fill every source_name name type and role cell

explanation: The required flag is invalid
fix: Use TRUE or FALSE

explanation: The column role is unsupported
fix: Choose a role offered by the dropdown

explanation: The canonical type is unsupported
fix: Choose a type offered by the type dropdown

explanation: The project language is unsupported
fix: Use zh-CN or en

explanation: A strict sheet is missing a required column
fix: Restore the original template column

explanation: A required plan section is missing
fix: Start again from the official template

explanation: The missing value state is unsupported
fix: Choose a state offered by the dropdown

explanation: A missing code refers to an unknown canonical name
fix: Use a name declared on the columns sheet

explanation: More than one column is marked as the record id
fix: Keep the id role on at most one column

explanation: The multi-select layout is unsupported
fix: Use delimited or columns

explanation: An output setting appears more than once
fix: Keep one row for each fixed output key

explanation: The cleaned output format is unsupported
fix: Use csv xlsx or parquet

explanation: An output key is not part of template 1.0
fix: Restore the fixed outputs rows

explanation: The report language is unsupported
fix: Use zh-CN or en

explanation: A required project value is blank
fix: Fill project id project name language and version

explanation: A rule id is duplicated
fix: Make every rule id unique

explanation: A rule id is blank
fix: Give every rule a short unique id

explanation: Rule parameters are not a JSON object
fix: Enter a valid object such as {"max":100}

explanation: Rule severity is unsupported
fix: Use info warn or fail

explanation: Rule type is unsupported
fix: Choose a rule type offered by the dropdown

explanation: A rule refers to an unknown canonical name
fix: Use a name declared on the columns sheet

explanation: A plan section has the wrong structure
fix: Use the official template or schema without changing structure

explanation: A text source has no encoding
fix: Declare encoding such as UTF-8 or GB18030

explanation: The source format is unsupported
fix: Choose a format offered by the dropdown

explanation: Advanced source options are not valid JSON
fix: Use one JSON object or leave options_json blank

explanation: A required source setting is blank
fix: Fill source path and format

explanation: The workbook version is not 1.0
fix: Create a fresh template with dcc_template

explanation: An unknown field or column was added
fix: Remove it and keep the official template structure

explanation: An unknown plan section was added
fix: Remove it and keep the nine official sections

explanation: A value label refers to an unknown canonical name
fix: Use a name declared on the columns sheet

explanation: A compiled rule has invalid severity
fix: Use info warn or fail

explanation: A compiled rule id is duplicated
fix: Make every rule id unique

explanation: An item-based rule has no item list
fix: Add items in the JSON parameters

explanation: A compiled rule has no id
fix: Fill the rule id cell

explanation: A range rule has no minimum or maximum
fix: Add min or max in JSON parameters

explanation: A score anomaly rule has no score variable
fix: Add score_var in JSON parameters

explanation: A set rule has no allowed values
fix: Add values in JSON parameters

explanation: A response time rule has no time variable
fix: Add time_var in JSON parameters

explanation: A trap item rule has no trap map
fix: Add traps in JSON parameters

explanation: A compiled rule type is unknown
fix: Choose a supported rule type

explanation: A range or set rule has no variable
fix: Fill variable with a canonical column name
